name: History page shows past study activity
description: A logged-in user opens the History page and sees past Feynman explanations, video sessions, or research queries grouped by date — or a clear empty-state message if there is no history yet. The page must NOT show a 404.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Open the History page by navigating to the /app/history route
If a tour or onboarding popup appears, dismiss it
Verify this is the real History page — it shows a heading or filter controls related to history, and is NOT a '404 / route doesn't exist' page and NOT a blank container

Verify the page shows EITHER a list of past study activity entries grouped by date, OR a clear empty-state message indicating no history yet — either confirms the History view rendered its content correctly
